emails.subject: P4 Inbound Waco Manifest 2026-03-17-001 — 2026-03-17
emails.body_text:
Jacob,

This is a variance notification for inbound Waco transfer manifest 2026-03-17-001, received today at Houston DC.

Variance detail:
- SKU: SC-001 (Sweet Cream Prairie)
- Manifest quantity: 440 cases
- Received quantity: 438 cases
- Variance: -2 cases (-0.5%)
- Classification: Minor (P4 threshold)

Temperature: Warmest reading -15°F. Tier 1 — accepted.
Seal: Intact.
Lot codes: A-20260315-01 — confirmed match to manifest.

Please confirm whether a short-ship credit or makeup on next transfer is expected.

Regards,
Inventory Operations Analyst
Houston DC

emails.subject: Re: P4 — Inbound Waco Manifest 2026-03-17-001 — 2026-03-17
emails.body_text:
Thanks for the heads-up. The -2 on SC-001 was a loading count error on our end — we'll add it to the next transfer. No credit needed.

Jacob

---
Jacob Patel | Production Planner — Waco
Prairie Star Creamery

emails.subject: P4 — Inbound Waco Manifest 2026-04-01-001 — 2026-04-01
emails.body_text:
Jacob,

Variance notification for inbound Waco transfer manifest 2026-04-01-001, received today at Houston DC.

Variance detail:
- SKU: SC-001 (Sweet Cream Prairie)
- Manifest quantity: 480 cases
- Received quantity: 477 cases
- Variance: -3 cases (-0.6%)
- Classification: Minor (P4 threshold)

Temperature: Warmest reading -15°F. Tier 1 — accepted.
Seal: Intact.
Lot codes: A-20260330-01 — confirmed match to manifest.

Please confirm disposition of the -3 case shortfall.

Regards,
Inventory Operations Analyst
Houston DC

emails.subject: Re: P4 — Inbound Waco Manifest 2026-04-01-001 — 2026-04-01
emails.body_text:
Got it. The -3 on SC-001 was a pallet restack issue during loading. We're adding a loading check step this week. Will make up the 3 cases on the Apr 14 transfer.

Jacob

---
Jacob Patel | Production Planner — Waco
Prairie Star Creamery

emails.subject: Q1 2026 Vendor Scorecard — Reminder
emails.body_text:
Hi,

Just a reminder that the Q1 2026 vendor scorecard aggregates are due by April 17. Please make sure vendor_scorecard.xlsx is up to date with all Q1 deliveries before we meet.

I'll be pulling the on-time %, quality %, and fill rate data ahead of the review.

Thanks,
Marcus

---
Marcus Liu | Procurement Specialist
Prairie Star Creamery

emails.body_text:

emails.subject: RE: PO-54820 — Short Delivery (2 cases lids)
emails.body_text:
Hi,

Apologies for the short on PO-54820 — 2 cases of lids were held back at our facility due to a labeling recheck. They'll be included in your next delivery (PO-54823, scheduled Apr 14).

No credit note needed — we'll make it whole on the next shipment.

Tom Brewer
Gulf Coast Packaging

emails.subject: Waco Transfer Schedule — Week of Apr 14
emails.body_text:
Hi,

Confirming the transfer schedule for the week of Apr 14:

Manifest 2026-04-14-001
- Departure: Apr 14, 06:00 CT from Waco
- ETA Houston: ~09:00 CT
- Contents: SC-001 (220 cases, lot A-20260411-01), SC-006 (220 cases, lot A-20260411-02)
- Total: 22 pallets, 440 cases
- Lot production date: Apr 11, 2026

Note: Line A was at reduced capacity Mon–Tue this week due to planned maintenance. Production is back to full capacity as of today. The 3 makeup cases from the Apr 1 shortfall are included in the SC-001 count above.

Jacob

---
Jacob Patel | Production Planner — Waco
Prairie Star Creamery
